Description.SourceString: Lurch tends to sleep most of the day. It's her metabolism that does the hard work, producing wind that will empty an entire barracks. Considering she will accidentally ignite that flatulence, she's often left to sleep on her own.
Description.LocalizedString: Lurch tends to sleep most of the day. It's her metabolism that does the hard work, producing wind that will empty an entire barracks. Considering she will accidentally ignite that flatulence, she's often left to sleep on her own.
